art_direction: Illustration 2.5D peinte et lisible sur mobile, silhouettes épaisses, base préhistorique chaude vers sommet hyperfutur cyan-violet

assets.prompt: Original premium portrait mobile tycoon battlefield climbing one monumental hill through successive eras, from prehistoric warriors to a luminous hyperfuturistic citadel; polished 2.5D hand-painted game illustration; deep navy, ember orange, antique gold, electric cyan and violet; no text, logos, trademarks, watermark or gore
assets.modifications: Source PNG archived outside the runtime bundle; converted to quality-78 WebP (224 KB); dark runtime color wash preserves HUD and unit readability

used_for: six allied and enemy combat roles
assets.modifications: Original project vector artwork arranged as six 128 by 128 cells and rendered with team rings, era palettes and state animation
Original vector mark combining the ascending timeline path, forge spark and summit; exported as transparent 192 px and 512 px PNGs for reliable mobile installation

visual_requirements.role: Hero title screen establishing the climb through nine ages
Readable combatants for all six gameplay roles
Structural hill path, capture ellipse and base gates
visual_requirements.exception: Procedural paths adapt exactly to every phone aspect ratio and remain subordinate to the generated painted backdrop
Original inline SVG paths are semantic interface glyphs, not visible art placeholders
